name: Red Beans & Rice (Randelman)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Green bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the kidney beans with a bay leaf and strips of green bell pepper in enough water to cover.
2. Simmer until tender. Drain the beans, reserving 3 cups of cooking liquid.
3. Heat olive oil in a pot; sauté onion, green bell pepper, and garlic for 5 minutes.
4. Add the drained beans, cumin, salt, black pepper, and rice to the pot.
5. Pour in the reserved stock and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until all liquid is absorbed (about 30-40 minutes).
7. Stir the rice with a fork, lower the heat, and let it simmer another 10 minutes.
8. Discard the bay leaf, adjust seasonings if needed, and serve.
Adapted from Randelman & Schwartz, "Memories of a Cuban Kitchen"
